_comment: Phase 48 / A11Y-03 — mobile Lighthouse perf budget on PUBLIC routes only (headless can't auth; no authed URLs -> no info-disclosure to temporary-public-storage, T-48-05-INFO). lhci runs against the PRODUCTION next build via `npm run start` (NOT next dev — Pitfall 6). NOTE: there is NO `preset: "mobile"` in Lighthouse 12.x (CLI `preset` only accepts perf/experimental/desktop; the Wave-0 stub's `preset:"mobile"` was an invalid value that failed `lhci collect`). Mobile IS the Lighthouse DEFAULT form-factor, set here EXPLICITLY via settings.formFactor + settings.screenEmulation (MotoG-class) so the config is unambiguous and self-documenting.
_baseline: Baselined 2026-06-28 (plan 48-05 Task 1), Lighthouse 12.6.1, mobile form-factor, simulated mobileSlow4G throttling. Measured categories:performance per route (single run): / 0.93, /security 0.94, /for-quants 0.92, /browse 0.94, /demo 0.67 (lowest). minScore seeded at 0.60 — 7 points UNDER the lowest measured (/demo) per the coverage-ratchet philosophy: low enough to absorb local-vs-CI + single-run noise, high enough that a real regression fails the build. The FIRST CI run on a GitHub Actions runner (3-run median, CI throttling) establishes the true CI baseline to ratchet UP from over time (do NOT set a hard 0.90+ day one — flaky-red).
